---
title: "Resources"
author: "Paulo Martel"
---

#### Helpers

-   [Python cheat sheet](files/Python_Cheat_Sheet.pdf)

-   [R and Python side by side](files/R_Python_Side_by_Side.pdf)

#### Links

-   [Python Home](https://www.python.org)

-   [Anaconda](https://www.anaconda.org)

#### Datasets

-   Anscomb Quartet

-   Iris Dataset

-   Embryo Development
